gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/373)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/373)
text: دَخَلَ قَوْمٌ عَلَى الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( صلوات الله عليه ) فَرَأَوْهُ مُخْتَضِباً بِالسَّوَادِ فَسَأَلُوهُ عَنْ ذَلِكَ فَمَدَّ يَدَهُ إِلَى لِحْيَتِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَمَرَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي غَزَاةٍ غَزَاهَا أَنْ يَخْتَضِبُوا بِالسَّوَادِ لِيَقْوَوْا بِهِ عَلَى الْمُشْرِكِينَ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Saeed Bin Janah, from Abu Khalid Al Zaydi, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A group of people came over to Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>, so they saw him<sup>asws</sup> as having dyed (hair) with the black. So they asked him<sup>asws</sup> about that. So he<sup>asws</sup> extended his<sup>asws</sup> hand towards his<sup>asws</sup> beard, then said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> ordered in a military expedition of his<sup>saww</sup> military expeditions, that: ‘Dye (your hair) with the black in order to be stronger upon the Polytheists’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sa‘id ibn Junah from abu Khalid al-Zaydiy from Jabir who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that once a group of people visited al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al- Salam, and saw black dye applied to his hairs. They asked him (the Imam) about it and he (the Imam) extended his hand to his beard and said, ‘The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, in an armed expedition commanded them to apply black dye so they can overpower the pagans.’”
